Business: Nagarjuna Fertilizers and Chemicals Limited manufactures and markets fertilizers and micro irrigation equipment in India. The company offers urea, specialty fertilizers, micronutrients, and supplements and OSR, as well as agri informatic services. It also provides digital payment solutions.   Current: 16.59  (+0.85% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
